subject: Re: SHRM contacts
snippet: Sounds good — I'm submitting the thing today, will ping you back with some reqs + a blurb!
text: Sounds good — I'm submitting the thing today, will ping you back with some reqs + a blurb! This is a reply to Laura Close about submitting something and requesting collaboration on requirements and documentation.

subject: Re: Follow-Up: Pamela x Careerspan — Next Play • Zo Computer • Founder Dinners
snippet: Amazing! Glad you're going to be able to join, and please bring as many folks along as you'd like, the more the merrier.
text: Amazing! Glad you're going to be able to join, and please bring as many folks along as you'd like, the more the merrier. This is an enthusiastic response about a founder dinner event at South Park Commons with AI Circle, discussing collaboration opportunities and next steps for product development and outreach.

subject: Re: Careerspan Business Development
snippet: First off, apologies for dropping off the radar for a bit. We had some fundraising questions that needed sorting out.
text: First off, apologies for dropping off the radar for a bit. We had some fundraising questions that needed sorting out on our end, which ended up taking all my bandwidth. Thankfully, things are back on track and we've been heads-down building and pushing forward on the platform with new job postings and integration capabilities.

subject: Partnership Discussion
snippet: Hey Darius, no worries. Let's move forward with a few pilots
text: Hey Darius, no worries. Let's move forward with a few pilots. We had some fundraising questions that needed sorting out on our end, which ended up taking all my bandwidth. Thankfully, things are back on track and we've been heads-down building and pushing forward.

subject: Update on Platform Progress
snippet: On the bright side, we've made some real progress: we now have about 400 jobs live
text: On the bright side, we've made some real progress: we now have about 400 jobs live on the platform, thanks in part to some McKinsey founder connections. Even better, we've built out the ability to generate direct application links for these jobs, which means we can easily distribute them through your channels.

subject: Commission Structure Discussion
snippet: At the moment, we're only getting a modest fee for sourcing via our magic links, but I'm definitely open to discussing a commission structure
text: At the moment, we're only getting a modest fee for sourcing via our magic links, but I'm definitely open to discussing a commission structure that works for both of us. We're ready to get the word out quickly and would love to leverage your reach. Let me know your thoughts.

subject: Next Steps and Timeline
snippet: If you want to jump on a call to hash out the details, just say the word.
text: If you want to jump on a call to hash out the details, just say the word. We can coordinate timing that works for both of us. Looking forward to building this partnership and exploring how we can work together.

subject: Follow up - Healthcare Vertical
snippet: I hear your strong case for healthcare verticals. Medical billing and coding is a significant opportunity
text: I hear your strong case for healthcare verticals, particularly medical billing and coding, given the volume opportunity. While we can't pivot there ourselves, I have two healthcare contacts coming your way that could use exactly that kind of sourcing. Let me know how you'd like to proceed on this front.
